tools.name: search_events
tools.description: Search upcoming Los Angeles events (concerts, parties, theater, family, sport and more). Returns compact JSON with venue, date, price-from, artists and a tickets link. Filter by free-text query, category tags, date range, location radius or budget.

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Get full details of one event by its id (from search_events results).

tools.name: get_best_ticket_prices
tools.description: Compare ticket prices for an event across marketplaces (Ticketmaster, Gametime, StubHub, Vivid Seats...). Gametime prices are fetched LIVE. Returns buy links sorted cheapest first.

tools.name: find_bars
tools.description: Find Los Angeles bars and nightclubs: by vibe (cocktail, rooftop, dive, techno...), near a location, or with happy hour running right now. Includes ratings, hours, happy hour info and links.

tools.name: whats_on_tonight
tools.description: One call for "what to do tonight in LA": top events until ~6am plus bars with happy hour on right now.

tools.name: get_taxonomy
tools.description: List all event category tags and bar/club vibe tags used by the other tools.
